challenge.label: Road to Mallorca — 15,000 km as a team

highlights.title: Hottest streak
highlights.text: Ebi is on a 14-day streak — keep it alive.

highlights.title: This week's leader
highlights.text: Alborz tops the team with 248.4 km across all sports this week.

highlights.title: Biggest session
highlights.text: Alborz logged a 84.1 km bike — the week's longest.

highlights.title: Road to Mallorca
highlights.text: Together you've covered 12631.5 of 15000 km (84.2%) toward the team goal.

highlights.title: King of the mountains
highlights.text: Alborz climbed 4514 m this week — the most of anyone.

highlights.title: Mr. Consistent
highlights.text: Sia has trained 93% of days over the last 8 weeks — relentless.

highlights.title: Team effort
highlights.text: 11 sessions and 449.9 km logged between you this week. Compounding.

highlights.title: Most balanced
highlights.text: Sia's swim/bike/run split is the most even — a true triathlete's engine.
